title: 7 Postpartum Constipation Remedies: Herbal Creams for Relief
description: Zingiber officinale creams, also known as ginger creams, can help with constipation due to their active properties and constituents. The creams typically contain compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which are responsible for their anti-inflammatory and digestive properties. These compounds help stimulate digestion, relax the muscles in the digestive tract, and increase the movement of food through the digestive system. This can help relieve constipation and promote regular bowel move...
